---
title: "Contact"
---

I am always open to collaborations, speaking engagements, or discussing spatial data science.

## Get in Touch

**Email:** [alex.rivera@example-uni.edu](mailto:alex.rivera@example-uni.edu)  
**Office:** 402 Geography Building, [University Name]  
**Phone:** +1 (555) 123-4567

## Social & Research Networks

- [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/example)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/example)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/example)

## Location

Office Hours: Tuesdays & Thursdays, 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM (or by appointment).
